channel.title: github_actions on cheo.dev
channel.description: Recent content in github_actions on cheo.dev

item.title: Automating blog deployments with my caddy-git fork
item.description: Summary I discuss how I automated the process of deploying this blog with Github Actions and my own forked version of caddy-git. This blog is built with the static site generator Hugo. When I make any changes to the source, I push the new commits to the GitHub repository where GitHub Actions will build the static files with actions-hugo: steps: - name: Checkout codebase uses: actions/checkout@v4 - name: Setup Hugo uses: peaceiris/actions-hugo@v2 with: hugo-version: '0.
